name: Deduction for Patronage Dividends and Per-Unit Retains

eligibility.description: Available to farmers' cooperatives and corporations operating on a cooperative basis that distribute net earnings to patrons based on quantity or value of business done.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Cooperatives can deduct amounts paid as patronage dividends or per-unit retain allocations from their taxable income, effectively allowing for single-level taxation at the patron level.
